title: nervilia umphangensis
intro: Nervilia umphangensis, also known as the Thai lady's slipper orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Thailand. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nervilia umphangensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical application, although further research is needed to fully explore its potential medicinal uses.
